release_notes: Fixed Linux self-update stuck on v0.9.2: the bundled update_manifest.json was not bumped alongside releases, causing _get_version() to report a stale version even after a successful pip/pipx upgrade. Version resolution now prefers installed pip metadata over the bundled manifest for pip installations.

changes.note: Bumped packaged update manifest to v0.9.4.
Fixed version priority: pip installations now prefer installed metadata over bundled manifest.
